name_en: ❤️Envelope Bag with Flap and Patchwork Leather, Shoulder/Crossbody Bag. Body made of Brand Vintage Retro Check Eco-friendly Canvas + Smooth Italian Tanned Leather. Eye-catching check print and contrasting topstitching, stiff and structured material, super eye-catching. Looks very high-end, the patchwork leather fully interprets the brand's British style! Design inspired by Trench coat collar shape, named after founder Thomas Bur's wife Catherine. Minimalist square style with a special design, very low-key yet identifiable. Snap button closure on both sides of the flap, decent capacity for daily needs, adjustable shoulder strap, versatile use, looks good in any style, can also be used as a clutch. Really great, very versatile for work or outings, suitable for all seasons, highly recommended! Dimensions: 24X17.5X5.5cm
